title: Ensure a Secure Password for Database Connection
description: Avoid unauthorized access, data breaches, system compromise, and unwanted modifications or deletions by using a secure password when connecting to a database.
recommendation: Configure a secure password for database authentication.
impact: Unauthorized Access to Sensitive Data, Compromise of System Integrity, Unwanted Modifications or Deletions

checks.message: Configure a secure password for database authentication. Avoid hardcoded or weak passwords.
